creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Tue Dec  3 12:37:14 2013
New Revision: 335567
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/335567

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Strip shared library
  - Support STAGEDIR
  
  PR:		ports/184457
  Submitted by:	Rodrigo Osorio <rodrigo@bebik.net> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/devel/libredblack/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/libredblack/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/devel/libredblack/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/libredblack/Makefile	Tue Dec  3 12:37:05 2013	(r335566)
+++ head/devel/libredblack/Makefile	Tue Dec  3 12:37:14 2013	(r335567)
@@ -10,14 +10,12 @@ MASTER_SITES=	SF
 MAINTAINER=	rodrigo@bebik.net
 COMMENT=	Library that provides the red-black balanced tree algorithm
 
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+
 USE_AUTOTOOLS=	libtool
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
 
-MAN1=		rbgen.1
-MAN3=		rbcloselist.3 rbdelete.3 rbdestroy.3 rbfind.3 rbinit.3 \
-		rblookup.3 rbopenlist.3 rbreadlist.3 rbsearch.3 rbwalk.3
-
 .if defined(WITHOUT_PYTHON)
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--without-rbgen
 PLIST_SUB+=	PYTHON="@comment "
@@ -26,11 +24,13 @@ USE_PYTHON=	yes
 PLIST_SUB+=	PYTHON=""
 .endif
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
 		's|^CFLAGS =.*$$|CFLAGS = @CFLAGS@|g' ${WRKSRC}/Makefile.in
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
 		's|implemented.*Various||g' ${WRKSRC}/rbgen.in
 
+post-install:
+	${STRIP_CMD} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/lib/libredblack.so
+
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/devel/libredblack/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/libredblack/pkg-plist	Tue Dec  3 12:37:05 2013	(r335566)
+++ head/devel/libredblack/pkg-plist	Tue Dec  3 12:37:14 2013	(r335567)
@@ -4,6 +4,17 @@ lib/libredblack.a
 lib/libredblack.la
 lib/libredblack.so
 lib/libredblack.so.2
+man/man1/rbgen.1.gz
+man/man3/rbcloselist.3.gz
+man/man3/rbdelete.3.gz
+man/man3/rbdestroy.3.gz
+man/man3/rbfind.3.gz
+man/man3/rbinit.3.gz
+man/man3/rblookup.3.gz
+man/man3/rbopenlist.3.gz
+man/man3/rbreadlist.3.gz
+man/man3/rbsearch.3.gz
+man/man3/rbwalk.3.gz
 %%DATADIR%%/redblack.c
 %%DATADIR%%/redblack.h
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%
_______________________________________________
